meaning: 扎伊尔,非洲扎伊尔货币名称
examples: However, Zaire, with its 90% mortality rate, was even worse.
Two strains of the disease, with almost identical symptoms, affected humans—Ebola-Zaire and Ebola-Sudan.
The Zaire frontosa lives thus, the most naturally and also possesses the best predatorial characteristics.
Notre Dame also has Andrew Hendrix, a senior with no starts, and freshman Malik Zaire at quarterback.
He has been on missions in Liberia, Yemen and Zaire, now the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
